# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

# azuredeploy.yaml
# ARM Template - Role Assignment for CI/CD Pipeline Service Principal
# This template assigns the Contributor role at subscription level
# NOTE: Must be deployed as a subscription-level deployment:
#   az deployment sub create --location <location> --template-file azuredeploy.yaml --parameters principalId=<object-id>

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2018-05-01/subscriptionDeploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: "1.0.0.0"

metadata:
  description: >
    Assigns the Contributor role to an existing Service Principal at the subscription level
    for CI/CD pipeline automation. The Service Principal must already exist in Azure AD
    (Microsoft Entra ID) as ARM templates cannot create Azure AD objects.
  author: DevOps Team
  version: "1.0.0"

parameters:
  principalId:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: >
        The Object ID (not Application ID) of the Service Principal to assign
        the Contributor role to. Retrieve this using:
        az ad sp show --id <appId> --query id -o tsv
    minLength: 36
    maxLength: 36

  roleDefinitionId:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c"
    metadata:
      description: >
        The GUID of the role definition to assign.
        Default is the built-in Contributor role.
        Contributor: b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c
        Reader: acdd72a7-3385-48ef-bd42-f606fba81ae7
        Owner: 8e3af657-a8ff-443c-a75c-2fe8c4bcb635
    allowedValues:
      - "b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c"
      - "acdd72a7-3385-48ef-bd42-f606fba81ae7"
      - "8e3af657-a8ff-443c-a75c-2fe8c4bcb635"

  roleAssignmentDescription:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "Contributor role for CI/CD pipeline Service Principal - enables full infrastructure deployment automation"
    metadata:
      description: A description for the role assignment for auditing purposes.

  deploymentTimestamp:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[utcNow()]"
    metadata:
      description: UTC timestamp of deployment for tracking purposes. Auto-generated.

variables:
  # Generate a deterministic GUID for the role assignment based on principalId and roleDefinitionId
  # This ensures idempotency - redeploying won't create duplicate assignments
  roleAssignmentName: "[guid(subscription().subscriptionId, parameters('principalId'), parameters('roleDefinitionId'))]"
  contributorRoleId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', parameters('roleDefinitionId'))]"

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
    name: "[variables('roleAssignmentName')]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[variables('contributorRoleId')]"
      principalId: "[parameters('principalId')]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal
      description: "[parameters('roleAssignmentDescription')]"

outputs:
  roleAssignmentId:
    type: string
    value: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', variables('roleAssignmentName'))]"
    metadata:
      description: The full resource ID of the created role assignment.

  roleAssignmentName:
    type: string
    value: "[variables('roleAssignmentName')]"
    metadata:
      description: The GUID name of the role assignment.

  assignedPrincipalId:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('principalId')]"
    metadata:
      description: The Object ID of the Service Principal that was granted access.

  assignedRoleDefinitionId:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('roleDefinitionId')]"
    metadata:
      description: The GUID of the role definition that was assigned.

  deploymentTimestamp:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('deploymentTimestamp')]"
    metadata:
      description: When this deployment was executed (UTC).

  deploymentNotes:
    type: string
    value: >
      SECURITY REMINDER - The Contributor role grants broad permissions including the ability
      to create, update, and delete most Azure resources. Follow the principle of least privilege
      and consider scoping to specific resource groups if full subscription access is not required.
      Regularly review and rotate Service Principal credentials. Monitor activity via Azure AD
      sign-in logs and Azure Activity Log.
